source_intake_record.raw_question_text:
In circle $ O$ chord $ AB$ is produced so that $ BC$ equals a radius of the circle. $ CO$ is drawn and extended to $ D$. $ AO$ is drawn. Which of the following expresses the relationship between $ x$ and $ y$?

<image1>

choice_map.D: $\text{there is no special relationship between }x\text{ and }y \\$
choice_map.E: $x=2y \text{ or }x=3y\text{, depending upon the length of }AB$

extraction_notes: raw_answer_text mapped from answer letter A using options
question includes <image1> and geometry relations on labeled angles, so image is required

image_dependency: 题干为几何作图题，但未在文字中给出 x、y 的具体位置关系，解答依赖图中标注与构型。
输入字段明确给出 requires_image=true 且 text_dominant=false。
asset_registry_record 显示存在题图且 registry_passed=true，图像可用。
multi_step: 题干包含多个几何条件与构造：圆 O、弦 AB 延长到 C、BC 等于半径、连接并延长 CO 到 D、连接 AO，需要综合这些条件推理。
问题要求判断 x 与 y 的关系，通常不是单一步读取，而是需要结合长度相等与角度关系进行几何推导。
metadata 中 multi_solution_policy.should_push_multi_solution_agent=true，说明上游也认为该样本具有较稳定的多步/多解潜力。
verifiability: answer_type 为 short_text，且 answer_text 明确为 x=3y，答案形式清晰。
同时提供 5 个选项，且选项 A 与 answer_text 完全一致，便于规则核验。
asset_registry_record 中 answer_present=true、question_present=true、registry_passed=true，基础核验条件较好。

decision_reasons: 资产完整：题干、答案与题图均存在，且 asset registry passed 无已知问题。
初步评分较高：image_dependency_score=0.96、multi_step_score=0.77、verifiability_score=0.92，整体质量较好。
该题虽依赖图形标注与几何构型，但关键图像资产可用，因此不构成降级或拒绝的充分理由。
答案为明确的 short_text，且有选项可对照，样本可验证性强。

normalization_record.normalized_question_text: In circle $O$, chord $AB$ is produced so that $BC$ equals a radius of the circle. $CO$ is drawn and extended to $D$. $AO$ is drawn. Which of the following expresses the relationship between $x$ and $y$?

normalized_choice_map.E: $x=2y \text{ or } x=3y\text{, depending upon the length of }AB$

normalization_notes: Removed the image placeholder token from the question text.
Normalized spacing in math expressions and stripped trailing LaTeX line-break markers from the answer and options.
Kept image dependency because the meanings of $x$ and $y$ are defined by the diagram and force_requires_image is true.
